newsItems.title: Rousseau International Achieves 100% Cambridge Examination Pass Rate
newsItems.content: We are immensely proud to announce that our Senior class has achieved historical success in the recent Cambridge IGCSE and A-Level exam sessions. Two of our students scored Top in Cameroon for Mathematics and Advanced Physics. This record reinforces our status as Cameroon's premier international academy.

newsItems.title: Summer English Intensive Prep Courses at British Council Language Center
newsItems.content: Are you planning to study abroad this fall? The Modern Language Centre at Rousseau is launching its signature intensive prep tracks for IELTS, TOEFL, and TFI. Dynamic sessions led by native speakers and Pearson-certified tutors are scheduled every weekday afternoon. Secure your seating before June 15th.

newsItems.title: New Modern Science Laboratory Commons Design Revealed
newsItems.content: In alignment with the OSSD core standards, RIS is building a state-of-the-art Science and Robotics commons. Equipped with augmented reality tools, dual-fume hoods, and dedicated project pods, the wing is slated to open for the autumn term.

testimonials.name: Dr. Florence Ngando
testimonials.text: Enrolling our children in Rousseau International was the best decision for their global futures. The rigor of the Cambridge curriculum matched with genuine individual care prepared them to compete on any global stage.

testimonials.name: Marc-Aurele Kamga
testimonials.text: Rousseau's IB Program transformed the way I compose my research and analyze complex problems. I obtained advanced standings at McGill due to my higher level credits.

testimonials.name: Stéphanie Desroches
testimonials.text: The transition from British Columbia to Douala was made entirely seamless by RIS. Having a certified Ontario Secondary Diploma (OSSD) path within Central Africa is unique and highly valuable.

partners.name: University of Toronto
partners.description: Top Canadian university offering direct admissions pathways for Rousseau OSSD and IB graduates.

partners.name: McGill University
partners.description: Renowned institution offering advanced transfer credits for our International Baccalaureate high scorers.

partners.name: King's College London
partners.description: Accepts Cambridge International A-Levels with fast-track admissions status.

partners.name: Sorbonne Université
partners.description: Direct partner for advanced French language credentials and collaborative European entries.

teachers.name: Dr. Helen Carter
teachers.subject: Educational Leadership
teachers.bio: With over 20 years heading elite bilingual academies across West Africa and Europe, Helen directs Rousseau with an unyielding standard for excellence.

teachers.name: Prof. George Ndip
teachers.subject: A-Level Calculus & Physics
teachers.bio: George is highly celebrated across Cameroon for sending multiple Olympiad candidates into Ivy Leagues. He keeps a rigorous but deeply inspiring classroom.
teachers.education: M.Sc. in Physics (University of Yaoundé I)

teachers.name: Mrs. Evelyn Brossard
teachers.subject: English Literature & Theory of Knowledge
teachers.bio: Evelyn ensures that students develop global-mindedness, rich critical writing habits, and beautiful oral presentation postures.

teachers.name: Mr. Samuel Tagne
teachers.subject: IELTS & TOEFL Academic Tutors
teachers.bio: Samuel coordinates tests for ETS and the British Council. He has over 15 years of standardizing language prep pedagogy.

faqItems.question: What curricula options exist for high school years?
faqItems.answer: At Rousseau, we provide three premier tracks: the Cambridge Assessment International Education (IGCSE & A-Levels), the International Baccalaureate (IB) Diploma Programme, and the Ontario Secondary School Diploma (OSSD - Canadian Track). Families choose the path that best matches their child's target universities.

faqItems.question: Is Rousseau an authorized center for English examinations?
faqItems.answer: Yes, we are highly official. RIS is an accredited British Council Language Centre and an authorized ETS center. We host regular sit-in sessions for IELTS, TOEFL, TOEIC, and French TFI with integrated dynamic prep workshops.

faqItems.question: Can we submit registration forms entirely online?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely. Parents can complete the 4-step Admissions process online. Once submitted, our team reviews current school records, schedules interviews/placement tests within 48 hours, and notifies outcomes digitally.

faqItems.question: Where is the physical campus located in Douala?
faqItems.answer: Our secure prestige campus is located in Douala, Cameroon (Bonanjo Administrative District), featuring fully safe laboratories, digital media hubs, spacious activity rooms, and a modern language library.

programs.title: Cambridge International Curriculum
programs.desc: Worldwide gold-standard secondary curriculum culminating in internationally celebrated IGCSE and Advanced Levels (A-Levels) credentials.
highlights: In-depth focus on STEM, Advanced Calculus, and English Humanities
Top-in-Country awards recognition by Cambridge Assessment
Direct access to premium universities across UK, Europe, and UAE

programs.title: International Baccalaureate (IB) Diploma
programs.desc: Comprehensive 2-year prestige program developing globally cautious, intellectually rigorous leaders through Theory of Knowledge (TOK) and CAS.
highlights: Direct second-year standings advanced credits at top US & Canada Ivy Leagues

programs.title: Ontario Secondary School Diploma (OSSD)
programs.desc: Official Canadian High School Diploma pathway, graded on continuous evaluation as in Ontario, avoiding final single-exam high-stress.
highlights: Direct OUAC code application for all Canadian universities
Focus on cooperative teamwork and real-world projects
Recognized on equal terms with domestic Canadian graduates

programs.title: English Certification Center
programs.desc: Authorized venue for elite British Council and ETS language exams with direct tailored pre-registration slots.
highlights: IELTS, TOEFL, TOEIC, and TFI official examination sit-ins
Intensive mock-drills led by certified ETS examiners
Official certification transcripts issued within 5-10 business days
